title: Prompt Upsampler Inference Flow
interaction_flow: main() → guardrail_presets: run_text_guardrail(input_prompt, guardrail_runner) → is_safe [GUARD: abort if not safe]

create_prompt_upsampler → create_text_model_config(model_ckpt_path, tokenizer_path, model_family='mistral', model_size='12b', is_instruct=True, max_batch_size=1, max_seq_len=1024) → (model_config, tokenizer_config)
run_chat_completion: builds dialogs = [[{role:'user', content:'Upsample the short caption to a long caption: <input>'}]]
run_chat_completion → chat_completion(model, dialogs, max_gen_len=512, temperature, top_p=None, top_k=None, logprobs=False)
chat_completion: checks tokenizer type (ImageTextTokenizer vs TextTokenizer)
chat_completion → model.generate(prompt_tokens, max_gen_len=512, temperature, top_k, top_p, compile_sampling, compile_prefill, ...) → (generation_tokens, generation_logprobs)
chat_completion → model.tokenizer.text_tokenizer.decode(t) for each t in generation_tokens → content
clean_text: strips newlines, removes '- **...**' sections with <10 words, strips prefixes/punctuation, normalizes whitespace
main() → guardrail_presets: run_text_guardrail(upsampled_prompt, guardrail_runner) → is_safe [GUARD: abort if not safe]
pipeline_integration_flow: if enable_prompt_upsampler AND NOT offload_prompt_upsampler → _load_prompt_upsampler_model() [eager load]
generate: if enable_prompt_upsampler AND word_count <= word_limit → _run_prompt_upsampler_on_prompt_with_offload(prompt)
generate: run_guardrail on upsampled_prompt [if not disable_guardrail]

chat_completion.signature: chat_completion(model: AutoRegressiveModel, dialogs: List, seed=None, temperature=0.01, top_k=None, top_p=None, max_gen_len=None, num_gen_seq=1, logprobs=False, generation_prefix='', compile_sampling=False, compile_prefill=False, stop_tokens=None, verbose=False) -> List[ChatPrediction]

run_chat_completion.signature: run_chat_completion(model: AutoRegressiveModel, input: str, temperature: float = 0.01) -> str
run_chat_completion.notes: Wraps chat_completion with fixed dialog template for upsampling. max_gen_len=512.

create_prompt_upsampler.notes: Builds mistral-12B instruct model with max_seq_len=1024, rope_dim='1D', pytorch_rope_version='v1'

clean_text.notes: Post-processing: newline normalization, bold section removal (<10 words), prefix stripping, whitespace normalization

DiffusionText2WorldGenerationPipeline._r.notes: Handles lazy load/unload of prompt_upsampler to save GPU memory when offload_prompt_upsampler=True

conditions_and_branching: Guardrail check on input prompt: if not safe → abort early
Guardrail check on upsampled prompt: if not safe → abort early
enable_prompt_upsampler flag: controls whether upsampling runs at all
word_limit_to_skip_upsampler: skip upsampling if prompt word count > threshold
offload_prompt_upsampler: lazy load model before call, unload after (GPU memory optimization)
Tokenizer type branching in chat_completion: ImageTextTokenizer (VLM path with images) vs TextTokenizer (text-only path)
important_notes: Text2World uses text-only AutoRegressiveModel (Mistral-12B instruct); Video2World uses VLM variant (run_chat_completion_vlm). Model checkpoint: Cosmos-UpsamplePrompt1-12B-Text2World. Dialog template: 'Upsample the short caption to a long caption: <input>'. max_seq_len=1024 at inference (trained on 512). Temperature defaults to 0.01 (near-deterministic).
